_comment: Core family data for tree visualization. Extended profiles (places, bio, photos) in assets/data/profiles/[profileFile].json

_schema.name: string (required) - Hebrew full name (computed from firstName + lastName)
_schema.nameEn: string (required) - English full name (computed from firstNameEn + lastNameEn)
_schema.previousFirstName: string (optional) - previous/maiden first name in Hebrew
_schema.previousLastName: string (optional) - previous/maiden last name in Hebrew
_schema.previousFirstNameEn: string (optional) - previous/maiden first name in English
_schema.previousLastNameEn: string (optional) - previous/maiden last name in English
_schema.birth: string - birth year or full date
_schema.death: string (optional) - death year or full date
_schema.spouses: array (optional) - multiple spouses: [{id, order, startYear, endYear, current}]
_schema.children: array - list of child IDs (numbers) ordered by birth year
_schema.parents: array - list of parent IDs (numbers) [male, female]
